# i18n DEAD-KEY baseline — generated by tool/audit/check_i18n_usage.dart (TOOLING_AUDIT T-001).
# Master keys with no reference found in mobile/lib. `make i18n-usage` fails on any drift.
# CLEARED by the T3-sweep-i18n PR: all 163 dead keys removed from the locale JSONs.
# A future dead key would be added here (by the sweep that removes it) — currently none.
